TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Malik_Beasley, title = Malik_Beasley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Malik_Beasley} }

S.FORM: Malik Beasley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1996, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, Malik Beasley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Malik Beasley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1996, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, Malik Beasley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: malik βeas~ɕlej ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw / pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, malik βeas~ɕlej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
